description: Cross-rule coordination for exception handling anti-patterns (GCI0032, GCI0003, GCI0016)

fixtures.name: Exception + Breaking Change (Method Removed)
fixtures.description: Method removed in v2.0, callers have empty catch that can't handle new API
fixtures.coordination_pattern: Breaking change + exception swallowing = compound risk

fixtures.name: Exception + Signature Change
fixtures.description: Method signature changed, old exception handler won't catch new exception type
fixtures.coordination_pattern: API change + incomplete error handling = upgrade risk

fixtures.name: Exception + Type Change
fixtures.description: Exception type changed between versions, catch block catches wrong type
fixtures.coordination_pattern: Breaking change: exception type migration without catch update

fixtures.name: Async + Empty Catch
fixtures.description: Async method with empty catch block, loses context and errors
fixtures.coordination_pattern: Async context + exception swallowing = silent failures

fixtures.name: Task.Result Blocking + Exception Swallow
fixtures.description: Blocking async call with .Result inside loop + empty catch = thread pool starvation + lost errors
fixtures.coordination_pattern: Async violation + exception swallowing = deadlock + debugging nightmare

fixtures.name: Async Void + Empty Catch
fixtures.description: Async void fire-and-forget method with empty catch - exceptions are completely lost
fixtures.coordination_pattern: Async void (already problematic) + exception swallowing = undebuggable

coordination_rules.name: Exception + Breaking Change Coordination
coordination_rules.condition: When both GCI0003 and GCI0032 fire in same diff
coordination_rules.rationale: Breaking changes + incomplete exception handling = compound risk. Callers upgrading will fail in unpredictable ways.

coordination_rules.name: Async + Exception Swallowing Coordination
coordination_rules.condition: When both GCI0016 and GCI0032 fire in same diff
coordination_rules.rationale: Async context loss + silent failures = dangerous combination. Thread pool starvation + lost error context = undebuggable.
